fields.description: As a user, I want to register an account so I can book flights.
fields.customfield_10000:
Email must be valid format.
Password must be at least 8 characters.
User should be able to submit form.
Cannot register with existing email.

fields.description: As a user, I want to search for flights using origin, destination, and dates so I can find available flights.
fields.customfield_10000:
Origin and destination must be different.
Departure date cannot be in the past.
Return date must be equal or after departure date.
Must show 'No flights found' if no flights match criteria.

fields.description: As a user, I want to pay for my booking using a credit card so I can complete my flight purchase.
fields.customfield_10000:
Credit card number must pass Luhn algorithm check.
Expiration date must be in the future.
CVV must be 3 or 4 digits.
Show success message on approved payment.
Show error message on declined payment.

fields.description: As a user, I want to receive a confirmation email after booking so I have a record of my flight details.
fields.customfield_10000:
Email must be sent immediately after successful payment.
Email must contain booking reference number.
Email must include passenger list and flight schedule.

fields.description: As a registered user, I want to edit my profile details so my information is up to date.
fields.customfield_10000:
First name and last name are required.
Phone number must contain only digits and optional '+' sign.
User can upload a profile picture.
